scenes.narrative_text: Growth can begin with very small personal moments.
scenes.narrative_meaning: Growth can begin with very small personal moments.
action: one hand lightly touching her chest

interaction.symbols: tiny integrated doodles belonging to the same illustration, never a toolbar

symbolic_elements: two or three tiny leaf or scribble motifs
composition: irregular warm cream halo behind her
negative_constraints: female must not dominate the canvas

scenes.narrative_text: Two people share a quiet moment of connection.
scenes.narrative_meaning: Quiet warmth, gentle closeness, and calm companionship.
action: both sitting naturally on a simple wooden bench

interaction.bench: both bodies make natural seated contact with the same bench
interaction.couple: subtle shared attention with anatomically plausible limbs and scale

environment_cues: no detailed park or city background
negative_constraints: no pasted bench, plant, or lantern

scenes.narrative_text: She is becoming comfortable with her own company.
scenes.narrative_meaning: Daily-life self-company can become quietly content and nourishing.
action: sitting naturally at a small table
actively eating a pleasant simple meal

interaction.utensil: fork or spoon held naturally and aligned with her hand
interaction.meal: meal directly in front of her at plausible scale
interaction.cup: small cup resting naturally on the table beside the meal
interaction.vase: tiny vase and flower remain a secondary integrated prop
interaction.furniture: body, chair, and table share coherent contact and perspective

environment_cues: one hanging lamp or warm lamp cue
subtle framed flower doodle only if composition allows
composition: organic cream vignette or blob behind scene cluster
character, table, and props read as one illustration
no detailed café or realistic restaurant

scenes.narrative_text: Absence can feel like a quiet shape beside us.
scenes.narrative_meaning: Loneliness and silent ache are represented by a faint absence, not a literal person.

interaction.empty_silhouette: faint empty human silhouette beside her represents absence and is not a detailed person
interaction.metaphor: all symbolic marks belong emotionally and spatially to the scene

environment_cues: muted taupe or cream vignette behind emotional cluster
symbolic_elements: subtle small falling marks or teardrops
negative_constraints: empty silhouette must not become a detailed real person
cloud and broken heart must not dominate
